backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Raj Empire Esports backend, handling user profiles, tournaments, registrations, support tickets, OTPs, terms & conditions, and social links with role-based access control via mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features listed.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, describing each page, component, and their key responsibilities.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Vite app, loading Google Fonts (Rajdhani, Orbitron, Saira Condensed) and mounting the React app into the root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that defines all TanStack Router routes and wraps the app with AuthProvider and AdminAuthProvider context providers.
frontend/src/components/AdminProtectedRo: Route guard component that redirects unauthenticated admin users to /admin using the AdminAuthContext.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer displaying the logo, navigation buttons, and dynamic social media links (YouTube, Instagram, Telegram) fetched from the backend.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky site header with logo, desktop and mobile navigation, and conditional login/logout/register/dashboard actions based on authentication state.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Shared layout wrapper that renders the Header, a main content Outlet, and Footer for pages using this layout.
frontend/src/components/PaymentModal.tsx: A modal component for tournament registration that lets users upload a payment screenshot, accept terms, and submit their registration with upload progress tracking.
frontend/src/components/ProtectedRoute.t: A route guard component that redirects unauthenticated users to the player login page.
frontend/src/context/AdminAuthContext.ts: Provides admin authentication context with hardcoded credentials, persisting auth state in localStorage.
frontend/src/context/AuthContext.tsx: Provides player authentication context storing session data (mobile, displayName, bgmiPlayerId) in localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor based on the current Internet Identity, initializing access control and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication provider and hook using DFINITY's AuthClient, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validity.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines all React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data including tournaments, registrations, players, support tickets, social links, and terms.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and defining Tailwind CSS theme variables, custom utility classes, scrollbar styling, and autofill overrides.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboardPage.ts: Admin dashboard page with tabbed navigation for managing tournaments, registrations, players, support tickets, terms, and social links, protected by admin authentication.
frontend/src/pages/AdminLoginPage.tsx: Renders the admin login form with username/password fields, validates credentials via AdminAuthContext, and redirects to the admin dashboard on success.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Player dashboard with tabs for browsing tournaments, viewing personal registrations, and profile info; supports tournament registration via a PaymentModal.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Public landing page showcasing the platform's features, hero section, and navigation links to registration/login; fetches social links dynamically.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Two-step player login flow (mobile number → OTP verification) that fetches the player profile from the backend actor and stores auth state on success.
frontend/src/pages/RegisterPage.tsx: Three-step player registration flow (mobile → OTP → profile details) that calls the backend actor to create an account and logs the user in on completion.
frontend/src/pages/TermsPage.tsx: Displays the Terms & Conditions content fetched from the backend, with a loading spinner and a fallback message if no content is set.
frontend/src/pages/TournamentsPage.tsx: Displays a list of BGMI tournaments with status badges, tournament details, and a register button that opens a PaymentModal for authenticated users or redirects to login for unauthenticated users.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence helpers and a function to clean sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts (Orbitron, Rajdhani, Saira Condensed), oklch-based color tokens, border radius, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the current project state for Raj Empire Esports, listing known issues (OTP auth error), pending feature requests (UI redesign, domain settings, OTP fix), and architectural notes about the Player and Admin panels.
